> **Standing instruction:** This document is regenerated/updated at the end of each working session before switching chats. It is the authoritative current-state snapshot. If anything here conflicts with memory or a prior summary, THIS document (verified against the live codebase on 2026-06-23) wins.

---

# PROJECT_STATE.md — Ziva BI Authoritative Codebase Snapshot

**Generated:** 2026-06-23  
**Git commit:** `227052d38e2f61f397927a055db112637672cdca`  
**Branch:** `main`  
**Method:** Generated by reading actual source files and model definitions — NOT from memory or prior summaries.

## Summary

Ziva BI is a multi-tenant, enterprise-grade finance automation SaaS platform. Stack: Next.js 15 (App Router) + TailwindCSS frontend, Python 3.12 + FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL via async SQLAlchemy + Alembic, Supabase Storage for files. Auth via JWT (access + refresh tokens) with session tracking, TOTP 2FA, and role-based access. All data is tenant-scoped; the test/live environment model uses shadow tenants (linked via `parent_tenant_id` on the `tenants` table). The platform supports a full implementation lifecycle: Trial → In Implementation → Live → Suspended.

---

## 1. Repository Structure

```
ziva-bi/
├── backend/
│   ├── alembic/versions/         — 36 migration files (72a96af → z6a7b8c9d0e1)
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── main.py               — FastAPI app boot, CORS, system role seeding, router registration
│   │   ├── config.py             — pydantic-settings: DATABASE_URL, ALLOWED_ORIGINS, SMTP, Supabase keys
│   │   ├── database.py           — async SQLAlchemy engine + AsyncSession factory
│   │   ├── core/security.py      — JWT create/verify, bcrypt hash, refresh token generation
│   │   ├── middleware/auth.py    — require_auth, require_super_admin, block_if_readonly_impersonation
│   │   ├── models/
│   │   │   ├── auth.py           — tenants, users, user_tenants, roles, permissions, role_permissions,
│   │   │   │                       user_roles, sessions, refresh_tokens, audit_logs
│   │   │   ├── setup.py          — implementation_locks, tenant_modules, document_rules,
│   │   │   │                       tenant_tax_config, tenant_fx_config, tenant_org_config,
│   │   │   │                       org_structure, accounting_periods, period_grace_overrides,
│   │   │   │                       future_posting_exceptions, close_checklist_items,
│   │   │   │                       period_checklist_completions, fiscal_year_states,
│   │   │   │                       period_audit_logs, employee_onboarding_tokens
│   │   │   ├── master_data.py    — tenant_dimensions, dimension_values, chart_of_accounts,
│   │   │   │                       gl_code_remaps, gl_dimension_requirements, category_gl_mappings,
│   │   │   │                       employees, employee_code_history, employee_transfers,
│   │   │   │                       cost_center_config, finance_review_config
│   │   │   ├── expenses.py       — expense_reports, expense_lines, expense_report_snapshots,
│   │   │   │                       tenant_expense_config, expense_categories
│   │   │   ├── approvals.py      — approval_matrix, expense_approvals
│   │   │   ├── gl.py             — journal_entries, journal_lines
│   │   │   ├── documents.py      — expense_documents
│   │   │   ├── bank_account.py   — bank_accounts
│   │   │   ├── account_mapping.py — posting_roles, tenant_account_mappings, tenant_posting_role_settings
│   │   │   └── tenant_management.py — tenant_invitations
│   │   ├── routers/
│   │   │   ├── auth.py           — signup, login, refresh-token, logout
│   │   │   ├── users.py          — profile, password, sessions, 2FA
│   │   │   ├── expenses.py       — expense report CRUD + submit
│   │   │   ├── approvals.py      — matrix config, submit, queue, approve/reject/refer-back
│   │   │   ├── tenant.py         — user management, invitations, test-environment, promote
│   │   │   ├── invitations.py    — public invite validate/accept
│   │   │   ├── documents.py      — file upload/list/delete (Supabase Storage)
│   │   │   ├── expense_config.py — coding level config, categories, form-config, GL coding
│   │   │   ├── config.py         — dimensions, dimension values, CoA, categories, GL search
│   │   │   ├── hr.py             — employees, cost-center heads, finance reviewers
│   │   │   ├── setup.py          — org, periods, modules, currencies, tax, roles, documents, go-live
│   │   │   ├── platform.py       — super-admin: tenant list/detail/lifecycle/suspend
│   │   │   ├── gl.py             — trial balance, account ledger
│   │   │   ├── account_mapping.py — posting role → GL mapping
│   │   │   └── bank_accounts.py  — bank account register CRUD
│   │   ├── schemas/              — Pydantic request/response models (one file per router)
│   │   └── services/
│   │       ├── tenant_clone.py   — Phase 4 live→test clone engine, 13 steps (Steps 1-13: dims, CoA,
│   │       │                       dim_vals, GL_reqs, acct_mappings, bank_accounts, employees,
│   │       │                       cc_configs, finance_review, org_config, modules, approval_matrix,
│   │       │                       org_structure)
│   │       ├── expense_posting.py — posts approved expense report to GL (synchronous, same transaction)
│   │       ├── gl_posting.py     — core GL journal validator + post_journal (flush-only; caller commits)
│   │       ├── gl_reporting.py   — trial_balance() + account_ledger() query builders
│   │       ├── periods.py        — period state machine helpers: is_date_postable, grace computation
│   │       ├── promotion_engine.py — Phase 3a: diff + apply config promotion from test → live
│   │       ├── account_determination.py — resolve_account(): posting role_key → GL account ID
│   │       └── storage.py        — Supabase Storage upload/delete/signed-URL proxy
│   └── scripts/seed_m7_categories.py — one-off seed script for M7 expense categories
├── frontend/src/
│   ├── app/                      — Next.js App Router pages (see §4)
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── AppHeader.tsx         — top navigation bar with environment toggle
│   │   ├── LockedField.tsx       — read-only field with "contact consultant" lock UI
│   │   ├── PromotionReviewDialog.tsx — test→live promotion review modal
│   │   └── expenses/
│   │       ├── ExpenseItemPicker.tsx — GL popup picker (group → subgroup → GL)
│   │       └── SplitLinePanel.tsx — split expense line management
│   ├── contexts/AuthContext.tsx  — JWT auth state, login/logout, token refresh
│   └── lib/
│       ├── api.ts                — typed fetch wrapper with auth headers + body serialization
│       ├── currencies.ts         — ISO 4217 currency list
│       └── utils.ts              — fmtCommaInput, stripCommas, cn (classnames)
└── docs/                         — PRDs, ADRs, briefs, diagnosis docs (markdown only)
```

---

## 2. Database Schema (authoritative — derived from ORM model files)

**Multi-tenancy mechanism:** Every operational table carries `tenant_id UUID NOT NULL FK → tenants.id ON DELETE CASCADE`. The JWT embeds `tenant_id`; the `require_auth` middleware extracts and enforces it. No query in normal operation can cross tenant boundaries. Shadow test tenants have a distinct `tenant_id` from their live parent, so isolation is automatic and free.

### 2.1 Tenant / Auth Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `tenants` | `id UUID PK`, `name`, `country CHAR(2)`, `slug UNIQUE`, `is_active`, `environment` ('live'/'test'), `parent_tenant_id UUID FK→tenants.id SET NULL`, `lifecycle_status` ('trial'/'in_implementation'/'live'/'suspended'), `dimensions_not_applicable`, `documents_setup_complete`, `module_setup_visited JSONB`, `suppress_outbound_email`, `test_data_retention_days`, `pre_suspension_status` | Root entity. Shadow test tenants have `parent_tenant_id` set. |
| `users` | `id UUID PK`, `email UNIQUE`, `full_name`, `first_name`, `account_type` (enum: individual/business), `is_active`, `is_super_admin`, `employee_code`, `department`, `job_title`, `phone`, `totp_secret`, `totp_enabled` | Global identity — one row per person across all tenants |
| `user_tenants` | `id UUID PK`, `user_id FK→users CASCADE`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE NULL`, `password_hash`, `is_active`, `role_tier` ('consultant'/'power_admin'/'functional_admin'), `failed_login_attempts`, `locked_until`, `last_login_at` | tenant_id NULL = individual account. UQ: (user_id, tenant_id); partial index for individual rows |
| `roles` | `id UUID PK`, `name`, `description`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE NULL`, `is_system` | System roles (tenant_id NULL, is_system=True) seeded at startup. 15 system roles defined. |
| `permissions` | `id UUID PK`, `code UNIQUE`, `description` | Canonical permission codes, seeded at startup |
| `role_permissions` | `id PK`, `role_id FK→roles CASCADE`, `permission_id FK→permissions CASCADE`, UQ:(role_id,permission_id) | |
| `user_roles` | `id PK`, `user_tenant_id FK→user_tenants CASCADE`, `role_id FK→roles CASCADE`, `assigned_at`, `assigned_by_id`, `revoked_at` | Role assignment per membership |
| `sessions` | `id PK`, `user_tenant_id FK→user_tenants CASCADE`, `ip_address`, `user_agent`, `expires_at`, `ended_at`, `is_active` | Login sessions; tied to refresh tokens |
| `refresh_tokens` | `id PK`, `session_id FK→sessions CASCADE`, `token_hash UNIQUE`, `expires_at`, `used_at`, `replaced_by_id`, `is_revoked` | SHA-256 hash only; supports token rotation + replay detection |
| `audit_logs` | `id PK`, `event_type`, `user_id FK→users SET NULL`, `tenant_id FK→tenants SET NULL`, `ip_address`, `log_metadata JSONB`, `created_at` | Append-only auth event log |
| `tenant_invitations` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `invited_by FK→users SET NULL`, `email`, `role`, `token UNIQUE`, `status` ('PENDING'/'ACCEPTED'/'EXPIRED'), `expires_at` | 48-hour invite token |

### 2.2 Organisation & Setup Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `tenant_org_config` | `id PK`, `tenant_id UNIQUE FK→tenants CASCADE`, `legal_name`, `rc_number`, `date_of_registration DATE`, `commencement_date DATE`, `company_type`, `industry`, `tin`, `vat_reg_number`, `country`, `registered_address TEXT`, `operating_address TEXT`, `company_phone`, `company_email`, `website`, `external_auditor`, `group_structure`, `parent_company_name`, **`functional_currency CHAR(3)`**, **`reporting_currency CHAR(3)`**, **`enabled_currencies JSONB`** (sorted ISO list), `authorised_share_capital NUMERIC(20,2)`, `fiscal_year_start_month INT`, `fiscal_year_start_day INT`, `fiscal_year_name_format`, `period_closing_frequency`, `branding JSONB`, `org_configuration JSONB`, `block_journal_into_open_prior BOOL DEFAULT TRUE`, `default_audit_grace_months INT DEFAULT 3` | **SOLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for functional_currency, reporting_currency, enabled_currencies** — functional_currency is protected from PATCH via PROTECTED_ORG_FIELDS. Auto-seeded at business signup with functional_currency derived from company country. Standing date floor: no transaction date may precede `date_of_registration`. |
| `tenant_fx_config` | `id PK`, `tenant_id UNIQUE FK→tenants CASCADE`, `fx_rates JSONB` (list of rate objects), `revaluation_rules JSONB` | Holds ONLY FX mechanics. Does NOT hold functional/reporting/enabled currencies — those are exclusively in `tenant_org_config`. |
| `tenant_tax_config` | `id PK`, `tenant_id UNIQUE FK→tenants CASCADE`, `vat_config JSONB`, `wht_config JSONB`, `paye_config JSONB`, `other_statutory JSONB` | One row per tenant; schema-less per tax type |
| `tenant_modules` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `module_key` (e.g. 'expense','ap','ar'), `is_active BOOL`, `is_licensed BOOL`, `activated_at`, `activated_by FK→users SET NULL`, UQ:(tenant_id,module_key) | Unlicensed modules: 403 if activate attempted |
| `implementation_locks` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `section`, `locked_at`, `locked_by FK→users SET NULL`, `notes` | Consultant-locked portal sections |
| `document_rules` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `module`, `transaction_type`, `document_name`, `is_required`, `track_expiry`, `ocr_template`, `max_size_mb INT DEFAULT 10`, `allowed_formats TEXT[]`, `max_files INT DEFAULT 0`, `is_active` | |
| `org_structure` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `parent_id FK→org_structure NULL`, `node_type` ('Legal entity'/'Division / Business unit'/'Department'/'Cost center'), `name`, `code`, `cost_center_code`, `entity_code`, `is_active BOOL`, `sort_order INT`, UQ:(tenant_id,code) | Self-referencing tree. **Cost centers are nodes where node_type='Cost center'.** This is the SOLE source of truth for cost center lookups — used by employees.cost_center_id and cost_center_config.cost_center_id. |
| `employee_onboarding_tokens` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `employee_id FK→employees CASCADE`, `token UNIQUE`, `expires_at`, `used_at` | 30-day self-onboarding token |

### 2.3 Period Management Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `accounting_periods` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `fiscal_year VARCHAR(20)`, `period_no INT`, `period_name`, `start_date DATE`, `end_date DATE`, `status` ('FUTURE'/'OPEN'/'SOFT_CLOSED'/'OVERDUE'/'HARD_CLOSED'), `hard_closed_at`, `hard_closed_by UUID`, `soft_closed_at`, `grace_expires_at`, `reopened_count INT DEFAULT 0`, UQ:(tenant_id,fiscal_year,period_no) | M8.3 Brief 1. Replaces fiscal_periods. Status machine: FUTURE→OPEN→SOFT_CLOSED→HARD_CLOSED. |
| `period_grace_overrides` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `module`, `applies_to_type`, `applies_to_role`, `applies_to_user_id UUID`, `period_type`, `grace_value INT`, `grace_unit`, `is_default BOOL` | M8.3 Brief 2 — per-module grace windows post soft-close |
| `future_posting_exceptions` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `created_by UUID`, `target_date DATE`, `module`, `reason TEXT` | M8.3 Brief 2 — explicit grants for future-dated posting |
| `close_checklist_items` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `label`, `description TEXT`, `applies_to` ('every_close'/'year_end_only'), `sort_order INT`, `is_active BOOL` | M8.3 Brief 3 — soft-deleted, completion history survives |
| `period_checklist_completions` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `period_id FK→accounting_periods CASCADE`, `checklist_item_id FK→close_checklist_items NO ACTION`, `item_label_snapshot`, `prepared_by UUID`, `prepared_at`, `approved_by UUID`, `approved_at`, `status` ('pending'/'prepared'/'approved'), UQ:(period_id,checklist_item_id) | Segregation of duties: approved_by ≠ prepared_by enforced in router |
| `fiscal_year_states` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `fiscal_year`, `status` ('OPEN'/'AUDIT_PENDING'/'AUDIT_OVERDUE'/'STATUTORY_CLOSED'), `management_closed_at`, `management_closed_by UUID`, `audit_grace_months INT DEFAULT 3`, `audit_grace_expires_at`, `statutory_closed_at`, `statutory_closed_by UUID`, `retained_earnings_rolled BOOL DEFAULT FALSE`, UQ:(tenant_id,fiscal_year) | M8.3 Brief 4 — two-stage year-end close. STATUTORY_CLOSED = permanent lock. |
| `period_audit_logs` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `fiscal_year`, `period_id UUID NULL`, `action` ('REOPEN'/'MANAGEMENT_CLOSE'/'STATUTORY_CLOSE'/'HARD_CLOSE'), `actor_id UUID`, `detail TEXT` | Append-only, no FK constraint on actor_id |

### 2.4 CoA & Dimensions Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `tenant_dimensions` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `name`, `code`, `is_required BOOL`, `is_active BOOL`, `sort_order INT`, `accepted_value_types`, `locked_by_implementation BOOL`, `value_source`, `dimension_sources JSONB`, `display_name`, `description`, `icon` | |
| `dimension_values` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `dimension_id FK→tenant_dimensions CASCADE`, `code`, `name`, `is_active BOOL`, `sort_order INT`, `value_type`, `cascade_dimension_id FK→tenant_dimensions SET NULL`, `cascade_value_id FK→dimension_values SET NULL`, `valid_from DATE`, `valid_to DATE` | ⚠️ dimension_values may have cost_center-typed rows (seeded by legacy paths) but they are NOT read by any live code path for cost center lookup — cost centers are in `org_structure`. |
| `chart_of_accounts` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `gl_number VARCHAR(50)`, `gl_name`, `account_type` ('PL'/'BS'/'SOCI'/'SOFP'), `is_active BOOL`, `gl_group`, `gl_subgroup`, `gl_sub_subgroup`, `fs_head`, `fs_note`, `tb_mapping`, `group_account_number`, `group_account_name`, `account_classification`, `is_foreign_currency BOOL`, `foreign_currency_code`, `revalue_at_period_end BOOL`, `locked_by_implementation BOOL`, `is_retired BOOL DEFAULT FALSE` | is_retired: set on GL retirement via remap; is_active alone cannot distinguish retired from plain-deactivated. |
| `gl_code_remaps` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `old_account_id FK→chart_of_accounts NO ACTION`, `new_account_id FK→chart_of_accounts NO ACTION`, `remapped_by FK→users SET NULL`, `remapped_at`, `reason` | ⚠️ NO CASCADE on account FKs — retired accounts must never be deleted. |
| `gl_dimension_requirements` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `gl_id FK→chart_of_accounts CASCADE`, `dimension_id FK→tenant_dimensions CASCADE`, `requirement` ('required'/'optional'/'na') | UQ implicit via business logic. Red Bull test shadow has 3,570 of these. |
| `category_gl_mappings` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `category_id FK→expense_categories CASCADE`, `gl_id FK→chart_of_accounts CASCADE`, `is_default BOOL` | Only one is_default per category, enforced in router |

### 2.5 Employee Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `employees` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `employee_code VARCHAR(100) NULL`, `first_name`, `last_name`, `other_name`, `preferred_name`, `email`, `phone`, **`cost_center_id FK→org_structure SET NULL`**, **`line_manager_id FK→employees SET NULL`** (self-referential), `resumption_date DATE`, `is_active BOOL`, `employee_code_auto_generated BOOL` | ⚠️ cost_center_id FKs to `org_structure.id` NOT `dimension_values.id`. |
| `employee_code_history` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `employee_id FK→employees CASCADE`, `old_code`, `new_code`, `change_type` ('retrospective'/'progressive'), `effective_date DATE`, `changed_by FK→users SET NULL`, `notes TEXT` | |
| `employee_transfers` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `employee_id FK→employees CASCADE`, `from_cost_center_id FK→org_structure SET NULL`, `to_cost_center_id FK→org_structure SET NULL`, `effective_date DATE`, `notes TEXT`, `transferred_by FK→users SET NULL` | |
| `cost_center_config` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, **`cost_center_id FK→org_structure CASCADE`**, `head_employee_id FK→employees SET NULL`, `head_user_id FK→users SET NULL` | ⚠️ cost_center_id FKs to `org_structure.id` — consistent with sole-source-of-truth invariant. UQ:(tenant_id,cost_center_id). |
| `finance_review_config` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `module` ('expense_retirement'/'accounts_payable'), `reviewer_user_id FK→users CASCADE`, `review_level INT DEFAULT 1`, `cost_center_id FK→org_structure SET NULL` | |

### 2.6 Expense Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `expense_reports` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `report_number UNIQUE per tenant`, `employee_id FK→users CASCADE`, `employee_code`, `employee_function`, `report_date DATE`, `status` ('DRAFT'/'SUBMITTED'/'PENDING_APPROVAL'/'APPROVED'/'REJECTED'/'REFERRED_TO_REQUESTOR'), `currency CHAR(3)`, `total_amount NUMERIC(15,2)`, `submitted_at`, `current_approval_level INT`, `rejection_comment TEXT`, `rejected_at_level INT`, `referred_back_from_level INT`, `referred_back_levels JSONB` | |
| `expense_lines` | `id PK`, `report_id FK→expense_reports CASCADE`, `line_number INT`, `pl_group`, `gl_account VARCHAR(255) NULL` (legacy text field), `io_dimension`, `cost_center`, `location`, `invoice_date DATE`, `invoice_number`, `description`, `amount NUMERIC(15,2)`, `category_id FK→expense_categories SET NULL`, `subcategory_id FK→expense_categories SET NULL`, **`gl_id FK→chart_of_accounts SET NULL`** (M9 structured ref), `dimension_values JSONB` ({dim_id: val_id}), `is_split_parent BOOL DEFAULT FALSE`, `split_parent_id FK→expense_lines SET NULL`, `flag_incorrect BOOL DEFAULT FALSE`, `flag_comment TEXT` | |
| `expense_report_snapshots` | `id PK`, `report_id FK→expense_reports CASCADE`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `snapshot_data JSONB`, `submitted_at`, `version INT DEFAULT 1` | Immutable; one per submission |
| `tenant_expense_config` | `id PK`, `tenant_id UNIQUE FK→tenants CASCADE`, `coding_level INT DEFAULT 0` (0-4), `require_category BOOL`, `require_subcategory BOOL`, `allow_free_text_description BOOL DEFAULT TRUE`, `show_location BOOL DEFAULT TRUE`, `require_location BOOL DEFAULT FALSE`, `locked_by_implementation BOOL` | coding_level: 0=Finance codes all, 1=Category only, 2=Category+GL confirm, 3=Guided GL, 4=Full GL |
| `expense_categories` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `name`, `code VARCHAR(100)`, `parent_id FK→expense_categories SET NULL`, `is_active BOOL`, `sort_order INT` | Two-level tree: parent_id=NULL → top-level |

### 2.7 Approval Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `approval_matrix` | `id PK`, `tenant_id UNIQUE FK→tenants CASCADE`, `levels INT`, `level1_role`, `level2_role NULL`, `level3_role NULL`, `amount_threshold_l2 NUMERIC(15,2) NULL`, `amount_threshold_l3 NUMERIC(15,2) NULL` | One row per tenant; upserted on save |
| `expense_approvals` | `id PK`, `report_id FK→expense_reports CASCADE`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `level INT`, `approver_id FK→users CASCADE`, `status` ('PENDING'/'APPROVED'/'REJECTED'/'REFERRED_BACK'), `comment TEXT`, `visible_to_requestor BOOL DEFAULT FALSE`, `response_comment TEXT`, `actioned_at` | One row per (report, level); only the row at current_approval_level is active |

### 2.8 GL / Journal Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `journal_entries` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `entry_date DATE`, `description`, `source` ('manual'/'expense'/'ap'/'fx'/'year_end'), `source_reference`, `reference_number` (JE-YYYY-000001), `status` ('DRAFT'/'POSTED'/'REVERSED'), `reverses_entry_id FK→journal_entries SET NULL`, `reversed_by_entry_id FK→journal_entries SET NULL`, `created_by FK→users SET NULL`, `posted_at`, UQ:(tenant_id,reference_number), INDEX:(tenant_id,entry_date) | POSTED = immutable |
| `journal_lines` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `journal_entry_id FK→journal_entries CASCADE`, `gl_account_id FK→chart_of_accounts NO CASCADE`, `debit NUMERIC(18,2)`, `credit NUMERIC(18,2)`, `description`, `line_number INT`, `dimensions JSONB`, `bank_account_id FK→bank_accounts SET NULL` | Application enforces: exactly one of debit/credit > 0; Σdebit == Σcredit across entry |

### 2.9 Account Mapping & Bank Tables

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `posting_roles` | `role_key VARCHAR(60) PK`, `label`, `statement` ('BS'/'PL'), `group`, `subgroup NULL`, `display_order INT`, `expected_account_type`, `is_control_account BOOL`, `description TEXT` | System-level catalogue; seeded in account_determination.py |
| `tenant_account_mappings` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `role_key FK→posting_roles CASCADE`, `gl_account_id FK→chart_of_accounts NO CASCADE`, `created_by FK→users SET NULL`, UQ:(tenant_id,role_key) | One GL per role per tenant |
| `tenant_posting_role_settings` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `role_key FK→posting_roles CASCADE`, `is_control_account_override BOOL NULL`, `is_relevant BOOL NULL`, UQ:(tenant_id,role_key) | NULL = use catalogue default; is_relevant is cosmetic only |
| `bank_accounts` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `bank_name`, `account_name`, `account_number`, `currency CHAR(3)`, `gl_account_id FK→chart_of_accounts NO CASCADE`, `is_default BOOL`, `is_active BOOL`, `created_by FK→users SET NULL` | At most one is_default per (tenant_id, currency) — enforced in app logic |

### 2.10 Documents Table

| Table | Key columns | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `expense_documents` | `id PK`, `tenant_id FK→tenants CASCADE`, `report_id FK→expense_reports CASCADE`, `line_id FK→expense_lines SET NULL` (NULL = report-level), `uploaded_by FK→users CASCADE`, `file_name`, `file_size INT`, `mime_type`, `storage_path VARCHAR(1000)` | Actual bytes in Supabase bucket 'documents'. Only path + metadata stored here. |

---

## 3. Architectural Invariants

| Invariant | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Cost center source of truth** | Cost centers live in `org_structure` (node_type='Cost center'). `employees.cost_center_id` and `cost_center_config.cost_center_id` both FK to `org_structure.id`. `dimension_values` may have cost_center-typed rows (legacy/seeded) but they are NOT read by any live code path for primary cost center lookup. |
| **Currency source of truth** | `tenant_org_config.functional_currency` (protected via PROTECTED_ORG_FIELDS), `.reporting_currency`, `.enabled_currencies JSONB` are the single authority. `tenant_fx_config` holds ONLY `fx_rates` and `revaluation_rules`. GET /api/setup/currencies reads from both. |
| **Standing date floor** | No transaction date may precede `tenant_org_config.date_of_registration`. |
| **lifecycle_status gates** | CoA Replace All only allowed when `lifecycle_status='in_implementation'`. CoA Remap only allowed when `lifecycle_status='live'`. |
| **Expense→GL posting** | Synchronous, same DB transaction as final approval. Uncoded lines (`gl_id=NULL` on non-split-parent rows) block posting with `ExpensePostingError`. |
| **GL entries immutable** | Once `status='POSTED'`, journal_entry rows may not be modified. Corrections require reversing entries. |
| **CoA retired accounts** | `is_retired=True` is set on GL retirement via remap. These rows remain in DB for historical journal integrity and cannot be deleted. `is_active=False` alone cannot distinguish retired from plain-deactivated. |
| **Split-line semantics** | `is_split_parent=True` rows are amount-rollup containers; only their child lines (with `split_parent_id` set) carry actual GL codes and dimension values. The posting service skips parents. |
| **Segregation of duties** | Period checklist: `approved_by ≠ prepared_by` enforced in the router. Consultant cannot self-approve go-live. |

---

## 4. API Endpoint Inventory

All endpoints (except auth, invitations, and onboarding) require JWT authentication via `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. All business endpoints also require a tenant context (`tenant_id` extracted from JWT).

### 4.1 Auth (`/api/auth`)

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/auth/signup | Register individual or business account | Public |
| POST | /api/auth/login | Email + password login; returns access + refresh tokens | Public |
| POST | /api/auth/refresh-token | Rotate refresh token, get new access token | Public (token in body) |
| POST | /api/auth/logout | Revoke refresh token, end session | Public (token in body) |

### 4.2 Users (`/api/users`)

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/users/me | Current user's full profile | auth |
| PATCH | /api/users/me | Update own profile (name, phone, department, job_title) | auth |
| PATCH | /api/users/me/password | Change own password (requires current password) | auth |
| GET | /api/users/tenant | List tenant users (for approver dropdowns) | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/users/me/sessions | List active sessions (is_current flagged) | auth |
| DELETE | /api/users/me/sessions/{session_id} | Revoke a specific session | auth |
| POST | /api/users/me/sessions/revoke-others | Sign out everywhere else | auth |
| POST | /api/users/me/2fa/enroll | Generate TOTP secret + otpauth URI | auth |
| POST | /api/users/me/2fa/verify | Confirm code → enable 2FA | auth |
| POST | /api/users/me/2fa/disable | Verify code → clear 2FA | auth |

### 4.3 Expense Reports (`/api/expenses`)

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/expenses/reports | Create DRAFT expense report | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/expenses/reports | List reports for current user (with status filter) | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/expenses/reports/{report_id} | Single report with lines | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/expenses/reports/{report_id}/lines | Add line to DRAFT report | auth + tenant |
| DELETE | /api/expenses/reports/{report_id}/lines/{line_id} | Remove line from DRAFT report | auth + tenant |
| PATCH | /api/expenses/reports/{report_id}/lines/{line_id} | Update individual line (auto-save) | auth + tenant |
| PATCH | /api/expenses/reports/{report_id} | Update DRAFT header | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/expenses/reports/{report_id}/submit | Submit DRAFT → SUBMITTED (legacy path) | auth + tenant |

### 4.4 Approvals (`/api/approvals`)

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/approvals/matrix | Create or upsert approval matrix | auth + tenant admin |
| GET | /api/approvals/matrix | Get current tenant's approval matrix | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/approvals/reports/{report_id}/submit | Submit report for approval (main submit path with approvers) | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/approvals/queue | Reports pending current user's approval | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/approvals/rejected | Reports rejected involving current user | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/approvals/reports/{report_id}/audit-log | Chronological event trail | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/approvals/reports/{report_id}/snapshot/{version} | Snapshot at a specific submission version | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/approvals/reports/{report_id} | All approval records for a report | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/approvals/{approval_id}/approve | Approve at current level; final approval triggers GL posting | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/approvals/{approval_id}/reject | Reject with required comment | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/approvals/{approval_id}/refer-back | Refer back to lower approver or requestor | auth + tenant |

### 4.5 Tenant Management (`/api/tenant`)

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/tenant/users | List all users in tenant | tenant admin |
| GET | /api/tenant/users/{user_id} | Get single user detail | tenant admin |
| PATCH | /api/tenant/users/{user_id}/roles | Replace user's roles | tenant admin |
| PATCH | /api/tenant/users/{user_id}/deactivate | Soft-deactivate user | tenant admin |
| PATCH | /api/tenant/users/{user_id}/reactivate | Reactivate user | tenant admin |
| POST | /api/tenant/invitations | Send invitation email ⚠️ SMTP stub — sends if SMTP configured, else console-logs | tenant admin |
| GET | /api/tenant/invitations | List all invitations | tenant admin |
| DELETE | /api/tenant/invitations/{invite_id} | Cancel pending invitation | tenant admin |
| POST | /api/tenant/create-test-environment | Create or retrieve shadow test tenant (calls clone engine) | tenant admin |
| POST | /api/tenant/promote | Copy selected config sections test → live (promotion_engine) | tenant admin |
| POST | /api/tenant/purge-test-data | **STUB** — no-op; scheduled purge not yet built | tenant admin |

### 4.6 Invitations (`/api/invitations`) — Public

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/invitations/validate/{token} | Validate token and return invite details | Public |
| POST | /api/invitations/accept/{token} | Create account and auto-login | Public |

### 4.7 Documents (`/api/documents`)

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/documents/reports/{report_id}/upload | Upload file (max 10MB; PDF/JPEG/PNG/XLSX/DOCX) | auth + tenant |
| GET | /api/documents/reports/{report_id} | List docs for a report (with signed Supabase URLs) | auth + tenant |
| DELETE | /api/documents/{document_id} | Delete doc (only on DRAFT/REJECTED/REFERRED_TO_REQUESTOR) | auth + tenant |

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/expense-config | Get tenant's GL coding config (or defaults if no row) | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/expense-config | Create or update coding level + flags | tenant admin |
| GET | /api/expense-config/categories | List active categories (hierarchical) | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/expense-config/categories | Create category or subcategory | tenant admin |
| PATCH | /api/expense-config/categories/{id} | Update category | tenant admin |
| DELETE | /api/expense-config/categories/{id} | Soft-delete + cascade to subcategories | tenant admin |
| GET | /api/expense-config/form-config | Combined config + categories + dimensions for expense form | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/expense-config/reports/{report_id}/gl-codes | Finance GL coding batch update | auth + tenant |

| Method | Path | Purpose | Guard |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/config/dimensions | List tenant dimensions | auth + tenant |

| POST | /api/config/dimensions | Create dimension | tenant admin |
| GET | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/inline-values | Merged values from all sources | auth + tenant |
| PATCH | /api/config/dimensions/{id} | Update dimension | tenant admin |
| DELETE | /api/config/dimensions/{id} | Soft delete (is_active=false) | tenant admin |
| PATCH | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/reactivate | Reactivate soft-deleted dimension | tenant admin |
| DELETE | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/permanent | Hard delete dimension + all its values | tenant admin |

| GET | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/values | List values for a dimension | auth + tenant |

| PATCH | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/values/{vid} | Update dimension value | tenant admin |
| DELETE | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/values/{vid} | Soft delete value | tenant admin |
| POST | /api/config/dimensions/{id}/values/upload | Bulk upload from xlsx/csv | tenant admin |

| DELETE | /api/config/coa/{id} | Soft delete GL account | tenant admin |
| GET | /api/config/coa/template | Download dynamically generated xlsx template | auth + tenant |

| GET | /api/config/categories | List full expense category tree with GL mappings | auth + tenant |

| GET | /api/config/gl/search | Search GL accounts with dimension requirements (?q=, ?limit=) | auth + tenant |

| POST | /api/setup/periods/{id}/checklist/{item_id}/prepare | Mark item prepared | auth + tenant |
| POST | /api/setup/periods/{id}/checklist/{item_id}/approve | Mark item approved (approver ≠ preparer enforced) | auth + tenant |

| GET | /api/setup/tax | Tax config (tenant_tax_config) | auth + tenant |
| PATCH | /api/setup/tax | Update tax config | tenant admin |

| POST | /api/setup/roles/assignments | Create role tier assignment | tenant admin |
| PATCH | /api/setup/roles/assignments/{id} | Update role tier assignment | tenant admin |

| DELETE | /api/setup/documents/{id} | Delete document rule | tenant admin |
| POST | /api/setup/go-live | Mark tenant as live (super_admin only) | super admin |

## 5. Key Model Relationships

```
tenants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ (one→many to all tenant-scoped tables via tenant_id)                           │
├── tenant_org_config (1:1)   ← functional/reporting/enabled currencies here     │
├── tenant_fx_config (1:1)    ← fx_rates + revaluation_rules only               │
├── tenant_modules (1:many)                                                      │
├── org_structure (tree: self-ref parent_id) ← cost centers live here           │
│     └── employees.cost_center_id → org_structure.id                           │
│     └── cost_center_config.cost_center_id → org_structure.id                  │
├── tenant_dimensions (1:many)                                                   │
│     └── dimension_values (many per dimension)                                  │
├── chart_of_accounts (1:many)                                                   │
│     └── gl_dimension_requirements (many per GL × dimension pair)              │
│     └── category_gl_mappings (many per subcategory)                           │
├── expense_categories (tree: self-ref parent_id)                                │
│     └── category_gl_mappings → chart_of_accounts                               │
├── expense_reports (1:many)                                                     │
│     └── expense_lines (many per report)                                        │
│     │     └── gl_id → chart_of_accounts                                        │
│     │     └── dimension_values JSONB {dim_id: val_id}                          │
│     │     └── split_parent_id → expense_lines (self-ref)                       │
│     └── expense_report_snapshots (one per submission)                           │
│     └── expense_approvals (one per level)                                       │
│     └── expense_documents (many per report/line)                               │
├── journal_entries (1:many)                                                     │
│     └── journal_lines → chart_of_accounts, bank_accounts                      │
├── bank_accounts → chart_of_accounts (BS GL required)                           │
├── posting_roles (global catalogue, not tenant-scoped)                          │
│     └── tenant_account_mappings (many per role × tenant) → chart_of_accounts  │
│     └── tenant_posting_role_settings (many per role × tenant)                 │
└── accounting_periods + fiscal_year_states + period_audit_logs                  │
      └── period_checklist_completions → close_checklist_items                   │
```

---

## 6. Feature / Milestone Status

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Auth (signup/login/JWT/2FA/sessions) | ✅ Built & working | TOTP 2FA built; session management with per-device revoke |
| Tenant invite & user management | ✅ Built & working | ⚠️ Email is stubbed — sends only if SMTP env vars configured; otherwise console.log |
| Expense submit → approve → GL posting | ✅ Built & working | Full chain: DRAFT→SUBMITTED→PENDING_APPROVAL→APPROVED+GL post. Final approval triggers synchronous double-entry journal posting. |
| Approval matrix (1–3 levels, amount thresholds) | ✅ Built & working | |
| Refer-back + audit trail + snapshots | ✅ Built & working | Separation of duties enforced. |
| Supporting documents (Supabase) | ✅ Built & working | Upload, list, delete. Report-level and line-level attachments. |
| Chart of Accounts (upload, CRUD, hierarchy) | ✅ Built & working | Full IFRS hierarchy, FS mappings, classification, FX flags, bulk upload/template |
| CoA remap (retire old → new code) | ✅ Built & working | Lifecycle gate: only in 'live' status. gl_code_remaps audit trail. |
| Dimensions (setup, values, cascade, bulk upload) | ✅ Built & working | Value source, dimension sources JSONB, display name |
| Expense categories + GL mappings | ✅ Built & working | Two-level tree; GL mapping with is_default |
| Expense coding levels 0–4 | ✅ Built & working | All 5 levels: GL popup, category picker, dimension fields, split lines |
| AI GL suggestions | ✅ Built | Returns suggestion on form load; 80%+ auto-fill, 40-79% pill |
| Employee master data (upload, CRUD, transfer, code change) | ✅ Built & working | cost_center_id → org_structure.id confirmed |
| Employee self-onboarding (/onboard/[token]) | ✅ Built & working | |
| Org structure (tree CRUD, upload/template, edit/delete) | ✅ Built & working | entity_code on legal entity nodes; 7-column template |
| Implementation portal (setup dashboard, all sections) | ✅ Built & working | 6-group sidebar, consultant banner, locked sequences |
| Accounting periods (generate, state machine, grace overrides) | ✅ Built & working | M8.3 Briefs 1–4 complete |
| Period close checklist (SOD, multi-sign-off) | ✅ Built & working | |
| Fiscal year close (management + statutory) | ✅ Built & working | |
| Currencies & FX UI | ✅ UI built | 4 tabs: Currencies, FX Rates, Revaluation Rules, BDC Register |
| Currencies & FX backend | ⚠️ Partially built | JSONB storage in tenant_org_config + tenant_fx_config works. No dedicated tables (tenant_currencies, tenant_fx_rates, tenant_bdc_entries) — these are planned but not yet migrated. |
| Tax & statutory UI + backend | ✅ Built | JSONB storage in tenant_tax_config; VAT/WHT/PAYE/other configs |
| Module activation (licensed gate) | ✅ Built & working | 403 if unlicensed activate attempted |
| Posting roles catalogue + GL account mapping UI | ✅ Built & working | Full taxonomy (BS/PL group/subgroup), control account override |
| Bank accounts register | ✅ Built & working | GL BS validation, default-per-currency, soft/hard delete |
| GL posting engine (journal_entries + journal_lines) | ✅ Built & working | Balance validation, period postability, dimension validation |
| Trial balance + account ledger | ✅ Built & working | POSTED entries only; optional dimension filter on ledger |
| Shadow test environment (clone engine) | ✅ Built & working | 13-step clone; 4,359 rows for Red Bull Nigeria test shadow |
| Test→live promotion engine | ✅ Built & working | Phase 3a diff+apply; selective config promotion |
| Owner portal (super admin UI) | ✅ UI + backend built | Tenant list/detail/lifecycle/suspend/reactivate |
| Consultant impersonation (enter tenant) | ✅ Built | Impersonation token minted; impersonation_mode in JWT; block_if_readonly_impersonation guard |
| role_tier wiring to accounts | ⚠️ Partially built | role_tier column exists on user_tenants; JWT carries it; consultant banner reads it. But full gate enforcement (e.g. blocking power_admin from overriding locked sections) is incomplete per ZIVA_BI_ROADMAP.md |
| Self-service trial provisioning (signup flow) | ⚠️ Not started | Path B from roadmap — auto-provisioned guided test environment on signup |
| GL manual journal entry UI | ⚠️ Not started | Backend tables exist (journal_entries/journal_lines); no frontend UI or router endpoint for manual entry |
| OCR / AI receipt scanning | ⚠️ Not started | M10 / Layer 2 shared service |
| Reporting (trial balance, FS statements) | ⚠️ Partial | Trial balance + account ledger APIs exist; no financial statement formatting or export |
| ERP integration / API push | ⚠️ Not started | Roadmap Phase 4 |
| Accounts Payable | ⚠️ Not started | Module licensed on test shadow but no code |
| Accounts Receivable | ⚠️ Not started | Module licensed on test shadow but no code |

---

## 7. Frontend Page Map

All pages under `/dashboard/business/` use the business layout with sidebar. Pages under `/platform/` use the owner portal layout.

| Route | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/` | Root — redirects to login |
| `/auth/login` | Email + password login |
| `/auth/signup` | Business signup with country + functional currency detection |
| `/invite/accept` | Invitation accept (creates new account) |
| `/onboard/[token]` | New hire self-onboarding form (public) |
| `/dashboard/business` | Main dashboard landing (redirects to setup) |
| `/dashboard/business/setup` | Implementation portal dashboard (progress + checklist cards) |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/organisation` | Legal identity, org structure tree, fiscal year |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/modules` | Module activation (subscribed/available split panel) |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/modules/[module]` | Module detail page |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/periods` | Accounting period management |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/currencies` | Currencies & FX (4 tabs; partially wired to backend) |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/tax` | Tax & statutory config |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/roles` | Roles & permissions matrix + tier assignments |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/documents` | Document rules per module/transaction type |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/account-mapping` | Posting role → GL mapping |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/bank-accounts` | Bank accounts register |
| `/dashboard/business/setup/go-live` | Go-live readiness checklist |
| `/dashboard/business/expenses` | Expense report list (with status filter tabs) |
| `/dashboard/business/expenses/new` | Create new expense report |
| `/dashboard/business/expenses/[report_id]` | Expense report detail view |
| `/dashboard/business/expenses/[report_id]/edit` | Edit DRAFT expense report (full M9 form) |
| `/dashboard/business/expenses/[report_id]/audit` | Audit trail |
| `/dashboard/business/expenses/[report_id]/snapshot/[version]` | Immutable snapshot at a submission version |
| `/dashboard/business/approvals` | Approval queue + rejected tab |
| `/dashboard/business/admin/users` | Tenant user management |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/dimensions` | Dimension setup (3-tab: setup/values/not-applicable) |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/dimensions/[id]/values` | Dimension values management |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/chart-of-accounts` | CoA management |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/employees` | Employee management (4-tab) |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/cost-centers` | Cost center head assignments |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/expense-categories` | Expense category tree |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/expense-config` | Expense coding level config |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/finance-review` | Finance reviewer config |
| `/dashboard/business/settings/approval-matrix` | Approval matrix config |
| `/dashboard/personal` | Personal dashboard (individual accounts — currently minimal) |
| `/dashboard/profile` | User profile (sessions, 2FA, password, personal info) |
| `/platform` | Owner portal landing |
| `/platform/tenants` | Tenant list |
| `/platform/tenants/[id]` | Tenant detail (users, modules, lifecycle controls) |
| `/platform/audit` | Platform audit log (**stub** — page shell only) |
| `/platform/billing` | Billing (**stub** — page shell only) |
| `/platform/settings` | Platform settings (**stub** — page shell only) |
| `/platform/support` | Support (**stub** — page shell only) |
| `/platform/team` | Team management (**stub** — page shell only) |
| `/platform/trials` | Trials management (**stub** — page shell only) |

| Backend URL (local dev) | `http://localhost:8000` |
| Frontend URL (local dev) | `http://localhost:3000` |
| API docs | `http://localhost:8000/api/docs` |
| CORS allowed origins | Always includes `localhost:3000`, `localhost:3001`; additional from `ALLOWED_ORIGINS` env var |
| SMTP status | **Stubbed** — invitation/approval emails only send if SMTP host/user/password are configured; otherwise the code catches the error and logs to console |
| Supabase Storage | Bucket: `documents` (private); config via `SUPABASE_URL`, `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, `SUPABASE_BUCKET` |
| Local DB status | **Fresh** — OS reload in June 2026 wiped `ziva_dev`. All 36 migrations must be reapplied (`alembic upgrade head`). No seed data. |
| Migration head (latest file) | `z6a7b8c9d0e1` (`z6a7b8c9d0e1_profile_sessions_2fa.py`) |
| Total migrations | 36 files (72a96af → z6a7b8c9d0e1) |

| Field | Value |

| Name | Red Bull Nigeria Limited (Test) |

**System roles seeded at startup (15 total):**
`super_admin`, `tenant_admin`, `employee`, `line_manager`, `approver`, `gm`, `finance_reviewer`, `finance_poster`, `finance_manager`, `internal_auditor`, `external_auditor`, `vendor_admin`, `customer_admin`, `hr_officer`, `payroll_officer`

---

## 9. Known Gaps / Tech Debt / Open Questions

1. **SMTP stub**: `POST /api/tenant/invitations` and approval notifications fall back to `console.log` if SMTP is not configured. No email delivery in default dev setup.

2. **Currencies & FX — no dedicated tables yet**: The frontend 4-tab Currencies & FX page is fully built (UI complete). The backend uses JSONB storage in `tenant_org_config.enabled_currencies` and `tenant_fx_config.fx_rates`/`revaluation_rules`. The planned separate tables (`tenant_currencies`, `tenant_fx_rates`, `tenant_revaluation_rules`, `tenant_bdc_entries`) with a proper migration are still pending (M8.3 Backend in roadmap).

3. **role_tier not fully gated**: The `role_tier` column exists on `user_tenants` and is included in the JWT. The consultant implementation banner works. However, the enforcement of `power_admin` being blocked from overriding consultant-locked sections is incomplete — the lock UI exists but full middleware/API enforcement is partial.

4. **Manual journal entry UI**: The GL tables (`journal_entries`, `journal_lines`) and the posting engine are built. There is no frontend page or backend router endpoint for manual journal entry yet.

5. **Purge test data endpoint**: `POST /api/tenant/purge-test-data` is a no-op stub. Scheduled test data purge is not yet implemented.

6. **GL statements and export**: `GET /api/gl/trial-balance` and `GET /api/gl/accounts/{id}/ledger` work. No financial statement formatting (SOFP/SOCI), no export to Excel/PDF, no ERP integration.

7. **Platform owner portal stubs**: `/platform/audit`, `/platform/billing`, `/platform/settings`, `/platform/support`, `/platform/team`, `/platform/trials` are page shells with no real functionality.

8. **Self-service trial provisioning (Path B)**: No implementation. The roadmap requires a detailed signup form that auto-provisions a guided test environment.

9. **OCR / AI engine**: Not started. Required for Expense and Tax modules at v1 (shared Layer 2 service).

10. **Responsive / mobile retrofit**: Existing setup and expense pages are desktop-oriented. The roadmap flags this as a v1 requirement; not yet done.

11. **Dimension_values cost_center rows**: `dimension_values` may still have `value_type='cost_center'` rows from legacy seeding paths. These rows are NOT read by any live code path for primary cost center resolution (which now uses `org_structure`), but they exist in the DB and may cause confusion.

12. **MASTER_CONTEXT §8 API paths are stale**: The master context lists `/api/config/cost-centers` and `/api/config/finance-review` but the actual implementation uses `/api/hr/cost-centers` and `/api/hr/finance-review`. MASTER_CONTEXT §8 should be updated.

13. **`expense_lines.gl_account` (text field)**: Legacy text field from M3 still exists alongside M9's structured `gl_id FK→chart_of_accounts`. Both columns coexist on the table. New code uses `gl_id`; the old `gl_account` text field is nullable.

14. **Local DB is empty**: After June 2026 OS reload, `ziva_dev` is empty. Must run `alembic upgrade head` and re-signup to test anything locally.

---
